tuesday.description: Mortadella is slow-cooked with wheat berries, rehydrated dried shiitake mushrooms, and finished with dried sawtooth coriander.

wednesday.description: Braised free-range pork shoulder is served with bhatura, sautéed organic Swiss chard, and a side of pizza sauce.

thursday.description: Grilled quail is paired with whole grain wheat berries, roasted organic endive, and a dollop of coriander chutney.

friday.description: Grilled grass-fed beef bavette is served with whole grain mochi rice, marinated organic olives, and garnished with dried hierba buena.

monday.description: Strozzapreti pasta is tossed with grated manouri cheese, roasted butternut squash, and sprinkled with ground furikake seasoning.

tuesday.description: Gluten-free sourdough loaf is topped with marcona almonds, roasted organic globe artichokes, and a drizzle of putanesca sauce.

wednesday.description: Black glutinous rice is paired with roasted globe artichokes, cashews, and a side of red miso paste.

thursday.description: Fourme d'Ambert cheese is served with brown rice, rehydrated snow fungus, and sprinkled with ground rasam powder.

friday.description: Sliced truffle cheese is paired with whole grain millet, sautéed spring onions, and a drizzle of cold-pressed grapeseed oil.
